## 🧾 Description
Closes #{ISSUE_NUMBER}. Provide a brief summary of what structural changes this pull request introduces.

## 🛠️ Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds design or coding functionality)
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change (fix or feature that alters baseline functionality)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update / Internal Refactor

## 🧪 Testing Verification
Describe the tests conducted to confirm stability:
- [ ] Local server compilation check.
- [ ] Script command execution validation (Cyber tracks).
- [ ] Linting and clean console verification.

## 📸 Checklists
- [ ] My code aligns cleanly with the repository's convention standards.
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my work before submitting for assignment.
- [ ] Components are responsive or scripts are safely contained.
